unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yaming saw the Guest-Greeting Pine, the Sea of Clouds, lots of strange rocks, and many ancient buildings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那个古老的 (ancient) 人表现得很耐心 (patient)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 度假营；营地 v. 露营；宿营
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: went to a summer camp
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 露营地 (camp) 里有一盏漂亮的台灯 (lamp)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The landscape there was amazing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: land (土地) + scape (景象) -> 土地上的景象就是风景。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: lots of strange rocks
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那个陌生 (strange) 的地方发生了一些改变 (change)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Where did Yaming / Emma go on holiday / vacation?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 假期 (vacation) 去了一个非常好玩的地方 (location)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't forget that.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: for (为了) + get (得到) -> 为了得到新的，就要忘记 (forget) 旧的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It was fantastic.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那个极好的 (fantastic) 玩具是塑料 (plastic) 做的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yes, we stayed in the old town for a few days, and we enjoyed it very much.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 顺着这条路往下 (down) 走，就是我们的那个小镇 (town)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 呼吸的空气；一口气
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It just took my breath away.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似记忆: breath (呼吸) 和 death (死亡) 只差一个字母，没有呼吸就死亡。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It just took my breath away.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: 拿走某人的呼吸 (breath) -> 让人惊讶得说不出话，令人惊叹。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Everything tasted good, especially the steamed chicken soup.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: especially 是在 specially (特别地) 前加 es 强化语气，意为“尤其”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Everything tasted good, especially the steamed chicken soup.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: steamed (蒸的) + chicken (鸡) + soup (汤) -> 汽锅鸡。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adv. & pron. 在任何地方；随便哪个地方
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Did you go anywhere interesting?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: any (任何) + where (地方) -> 任何地方。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: pron. 没有事；没有任何东西
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I did nothing special.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: no (没有) + thing (东西) -> 没有东西。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Really? Everyone says the scenery around the West Lake is so beautiful.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: scen (看，舞台) + ery -> 舞台上的景色就是风景。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: already (已经) 的词根就是 ready (准备好的)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 马上要(做某事)；愿意做(某事)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: ready (准备好的) + to do (去干某事)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adv. 在某处；到某处 pron. 某处；某个地方
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: some (一些) + where (地方) -> 某个地方。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No one could join me, so I went by myself.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: my (我的) + self (自己) -> 我自己。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I could do nothing but stay in the hotel.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 固定表达: nothing (没有东西) + but (除了) -> 除了这个没有别的 -> 只有。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I could do nothing but stay in the hotel.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: 后台 (hotel)，大旅馆的后台都很硬。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 使人舒服的；舒适的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The hotel was nice, with a comfortable bed, and everything was very clean.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆: comfort (安慰，舒服) + able (能够...的) -> 使人觉得舒服的。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I felt bored, so I decided to look for something to read.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似记忆: 每天对着木板 (board) 就会感到厌倦 (bored)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Look at the sky! How amazing!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那个间谍 (spy) 正抬头看着天空 (sky)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I got up and walked towards the window.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 方向后缀: to (向) + wards (表示方向的后缀) -> 朝着某处。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There was a beautiful double rainbow in the sky.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: rain (下雨) + bow (弓) -> 雨后天空中像弓一样的七彩桥就是彩虹。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wow, it's a silk scarf.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音联想: 丝绸 (silk) 摸起来像牛奶 (milk) 一样光滑。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wow, it's a silk scarf.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音联想: 这条 scarf (围巾) 的质量真是“死卡夫” (极好)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: After that, we went to Red Square.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: “死鬼呀”，在广场 (square) 上大喊死鬼呀。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 在春天 (spring) 期间 (during)，繁花盛开。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the morning, we went to the Victory Museum.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 那个胜利 (victory) 将被载入历史 (history) 中。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 俄罗斯的；俄罗斯人的 n. 俄罗斯人；俄语
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 音译词: Russia (俄罗斯) + n -> 俄罗斯的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 战斗；搏斗；斗争 v. 打仗；打架
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似联想: 战士们在深夜 (night) 依然英勇战斗 (fight)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 导游；指南 v. 领路；指导
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I worked as a tour guide at a museum.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: 导游 (guide) 走在队伍的“最前排” (guide)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: again (再次) + st -> 再次反对 (against) 对方的意见。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: fight (斗争) + against (反对，对抗) -> 与……作斗争。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: art (艺术) + work (工作/作品) -> 艺术作品。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 数以千计的；成千上万的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: thousands (成千) + of (的) -> 数以千计的。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: 提着 (tear) 一大袋眼泪。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: re (再次) + mind (心，脑子) -> 让脑子里再次想起 -> 提醒。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似记忆: 一片 (piece) 土地上终于迎来了和平 (peace)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: easy (容易的) 变 y 为 i 再加 ly -> 容易地。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At noon, we had lunch at a restaurant near the park.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似记忆: 中午 (noon) 很快 (soon) 就要到了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 生病 (sick) 的时候不要去摘 (pick) 花。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We took the Moscow Metro to travel around.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: “美桌”，地铁站里有一张很美的桌子。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The metro stations are really beautiful.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 我们国家 (nation) 的火车站 (station) 非常漂亮。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sometimes I felt like I was walking inside a palace.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似记忆: 王宫 (palace) 是一个非常特别的地方 (place)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Later, someone took out his accordion, and soon everyone got together to sing and dance.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: accordion 是手风琴，发音很长，像手风琴拉出的长音。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Later, someone took out his accordion, and soon everyone got together to sing and dance.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: get (得到，到达) + together (在一起) -> 聚在一起，聚会。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I felt sick after staying in the sun for too long.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 固定搭配: in (在...里面) + the sun (太阳) -> 晒太阳，在阳光下。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The tour guide told us the ancient tower was over 1,000 years old.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆: 这座高塔 (tower) 旁边开满鲜花 (flower)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over budget.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 形似记忆: 今天晚上 (night) 可能 (might) 会下雨。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 预算 v. 精打细算
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over budget.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: “拔地鸡”，买这只鸡超出了我的预算 (budget)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Please remind me to take my passport before I leave.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: pass (通过) + port (港口) -> 能让你通过港口/海关的东西就是护照。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm getting a little forgetful these days.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀法: forget (忘记) + ful (充满...的) -> 充满忘记的，意为健忘的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some travel to see beautiful sights and relax in strange, faraway places.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: far (远的) + away (离开) -> 遥远的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Then you can go back to your regular life, and be ready to see what comes next.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆: “若谷勒”，有规律的 (regular) 生活要虚怀若谷。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We stayed in a comfortable house in the countryside with beautiful scenery.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词: country (国家，乡下) + side (旁边) -> 乡下，乡村。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I turned around and was surprised to see a deer.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: turn (转动) + around (周围) -> 转身。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I turned around and was surprised to see a deer.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: surprise (使惊奇) + ed (形容词后缀, 感到...) -> 感到惊讶的。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I turned around and was surprised to see a deer.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音联想: 鹿 (deer) 最喜欢喝啤酒 (beer)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The deer is probably looking for food and hoping to get some from you.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词干法: probable (很可能的) 变 y 为 ly -> 很可能地。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The deer is probably looking for food and hoping to get some from you.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: look (看) + for (为了...) -> 为了得到某样东西而去看 -> 寻找。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We took a lot of great photos there.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: take (拿，拍摄) + photos (照片) -> 拍照。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: feel like (想要) + eating (吃东西) -> 想要吃。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: So now, I just want to get a good night's sleep.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: get (得到) + a good night's sleep (一夜好眠) -> 好好睡一觉。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over budget.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 短语拆解: over (超过) + budget (预算) -> 超出预算。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yaming saw the Guest-Greeting Pine, the Sea of Clouds, lots of strange rocks, and many ancient buildings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 专有名词: Guest (客人) + Greeting (问候，迎接) + Pine (松树) -> 迎客松。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yaming saw the Guest-Greeting Pine, the Sea of Clouds, lots of strange rocks, and many ancient buildings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 专有名词: Sea (海洋) + of (的) + Clouds (云朵) -> 云海。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the morning, we went to the Victory Museum.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 专有名词: Victory (胜利) + Museum (博物馆) -> 胜利博物馆。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 历史词汇: World War II 即第二次世界大战。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: After that, we went to Red Square.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 专有名词: Red (红色的) + Square (广场) -> 莫斯科红场。
